posts.title: The evolution of LLM tool-use from API calls to agentic applications
posts.summary: A look at the evolution of LLM tool-use, from supervised fine-tuning to Reinforcement Learning (RLVR) and agentic applications in large and specialized models. The post The evolution of LLM tool-use from API calls to agentic applications first appeared on TechTalks .
posts.author: Ben Dickson
